title: The Warlord Shows His Power
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on the warlord shows his power, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Warlord Shows His Power. Luffy stays behind to fight Crocodile for the first time, learning the terrifying gap between resolve and a Warlord’s power. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Forget 60 minutes! At this rate, we'll all drown in less than 20 minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Please hold on just a little longer!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'll definitely bring back help soon!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I swear I won't let any of you die!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: If we include the members defeated by Poll the Falcon earlier on,

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Then it appears all the millions stationed in this town have been defeated.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Some guy... called Mr. Prince... did all this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He... headed south of the town... just now...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You think a little piece of shit like you...

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Why don't you just leave him be?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Who've dared to make a fool out of me...!

summary: This part develops the warlord shows his power and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
